chapter.label: Tale 81
chapter.title: A Well That Filled With Water When An Icon Of The Same Abba Theodosios Was Let Down Into It

paragraphs.text: The same fathers also told us that in those days, a Christ-loving woman of the district of Apamea dug a well. She spent a great deal of money on the project and dug very deep, but she found no water.

Having put so much money and effort into the project, she was very discouraged. Then one day, she had a vision of somebody saying to her: ‘Send for and bring the picture of Abba Theodosios at Skopelos and by that means God will give you water. The woman sent two men at once. They took the icon of the saint and let it down into the well and immediately water began to flow; it filled the well-shaft up to the half-way point. The men who drew the icon up out of the water brought us some of it; we drank of it and all gave thanks to God.
